- The image displays a high-angle security camera view of an interior hallway or lobby area.
- On the left side, a glass railing with vertical metal bars separates the upper walkway from a lower level where a staircase is visible in the background.
- A person wearing dark clothing is standing near the railing, leaning forward and looking down towards the area below.
- In the center of the hallway, a black rolling cart with multiple shelves stands stationary; it holds a yellow tray on top and indistinct items on the shelves below.
- To the right side of the frame, two elevator doors are visible, with the door on the far right displaying the number 46.
- A wall-mounted intercom or telephone device is attached to the wall immediately next to the elevator doors on the right.
- The floor is covered in light-colored tiles that reflect the overhead fluorescent lighting.
- Reflections of the overhead lights can be seen on the glass surface of the railing.

### Visible Text
- "46" (on the elevator door)
- "160 SW 2/80 - 07/22/2019 19:33:21" (timestamp overlay at the bottom center)

### Notable Changes
- This is the first frame in the sequence.
